title: NumNum GOOtensil Pre-Spoons - Baby Spoons Set for 6+ Months - Silicone Self Feeding Utensils BPA-Free - Baby Led Weaning (BLW) Supplies & Feeding Essentials - 2 Spoons (Blue & Orange)
features: DESIGNED FOR LITTLE HANDS AGES 6-18 MONTHS: This clever Pre-Spoon, tailored for tiny hands, eliminates scooping and balancing struggles. Best of all, there's no wrong way to hold it, thanks to its secret: a thick contoured handle that provides a secure, no-slip grip.

EASY SELF-FEEDING FOR THE FIRST STAGE: Make the starting solids transition easier (and more fun!) for baby. Each set comes with a pre-spoon perfect for purees, doubling as a teether for sore gums, along with an open-channel spoon designed to grip soft solids. These spoons help teach the skills and motions needed to graduate to a traditional spoon, without requiring wrist rotation to use - a skill children typically don’t develop until 2 years old.

PERFECT FOR ALL TYPES OF FOOD: These versatile spoons, designed for babies aged 6+ months, are a mealtime must-have as your child’s eating habits mature. Add this essential to your baby registry now for when baby’s ready to start soft solids. Unlike traditional spoons, GOOtensils grip the food to help keep things less messy.

EASY TO HOLD FOR BABY LED WEANING: Let baby lead the way. Our innovative, patented Pre-Spoon has a unique all-flat design that empowers your little one on their baby-led weaning (BLW) journey. While other baby spoons are too long or too flexible, this one is just right—allowing little hands to self-feed with ease and without frustration.

SIMPLE TO CLEAN & PEDIATRIC OT RECOMMENDED: Approved and tested by baby care experts, our spoons are incredibly durable, ensuring long-lasting use. Made with food-grade silicone, they’re free from harmful chemicals like BPA and phthalates so you can feel good about giving them to your little one. Clean up is easy in the dishwasher. Microwave or steam-sterilizing is not recommended (and not needed).
description: Product description: Children are curious about the world around them. NUM NUM's mission is to develop innovative products that encourage the little ones' exploration, which translates into a very positive learning experience that fosters their independence and self-confidence. Set of two pre-spoons NumNum, designed to make meals easier for the little ones. They facilitate self-feeding and promote your baby's learning. Ideal for use with a wide variety of baby foods: purees, yogurt, homemade mixes, oatmeal and much more. Easier to use than a conventional spoon as the head is flat so the baby doesn't need to turn your wrist. The baby will always receive them correctly. A tool that facilitates the self-feeding of the little ones. To learn to eat properly, you have first introduce the first stage pre-spoon, with raised textures that soothe sore gums and help the baby get used to using utensils. The thick handle is designed to adapt to the shape of your hand. Ideal for fine puree. Once learned the basic movement of bringing the spoon closer to the mouth, it's helpful to switch to the Stage 2 pre-spoon. With collection channels that allow for a larger capacity and hold food in every spoon. Especially suitable for thicker or thick puree. Product Details: Consists of: 1 pre-spoon Stage 1 and 1 pre-spoon Stage 2. Recommended age: +6 months. The part that comes into contact with food is 100% food grade silicone. Does not contain PVC, BPA or phthalates. Dishwasher safe. DO NOT USE IN MICROWAVE OVEN. DO NOT STERILIZE WITH STEAM Mealtime is now easier and safer! Contents of the box: Two pre-spoons

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎*Do not microwave, *Do not steam sterilize, Dishwasher safe
